name: permission channel binds successor
requirement: The successor is behind admitted permission channel 005.

name: signature preserved
requirement: The role-anchor signature is preserved exactly from P to Q.

name: role sequence preserved
requirement: Segment-role sequence is preserved from P to Q.

name: anchor counts preserved
requirement: Anchor-limit counts are preserved from P to Q.

name: target packet is existing body edges
requirement: Q consists of four existing body edges.

name: body unchanged
requirement: G900 body remains 900 vertices and 3600 edges.

name: no body mutation
requirement: Support audit does not mutate body, add vertices, or add edges.

name: not admitted transport
requirement: Support audit does not admit information transport.

name: no physical claim
requirement: Support audit makes no physical, force, or unification claim.
